subscribed.title: You're subscribed to our newsletter!
subscribed.body: Stay tuned toward the end of the month. In the meantime, you can browse previous newsletters below.

appointments.title: Appointments
appointments.bodyOne: We can open the center for individuals or groups by appointment outside of our normal operating hours.
appointments.bodyTwo: Many youth groups schedule guided activities and classes on Wednesday evenings from 6pm to 8pm.

about.title: About This Center
about.body: The Burley FamilySearch Center helps people research their family history and preserve memories for future generations. Staff are available for one-on-one help, and we offer classes for all ages and experience levels. We can also digitize most media types, including VHS and VHS-C tapes, mini DV, 8 mm cassette films, audio cassettes, audio reels, 8 mm reel films, slides, negatives, photographs, documents, and newspaper clippings.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.description: Plan a visit to attend a class or meet one-on-one with a worker.

groups.title: Group Visits
groups.description: Plan and manage group visits to the center.

research.title: Research Specialists
research.description: Get help from trained research specialists.

projects.title: Community Projects
projects.description: Explore and contribute to local history projects.

newsletters.title: Newsletters
newsletters.description: Read updates, highlights, and center news.

connect.title: Stay Connected
connect.body: Subscribe, follow, or visit regularly for updates.
